description: Local-first LSAT practice analytics from authenticated LawHub score metadata, with SQLite, weakness reports, question notes, and safe review links back to LawHub.
killer_feature: Turn LawHub practice-test history into local weakness analytics without storing copyrighted LSAT content.

novel_features.name: Safe LSAT analytics mirror
novel_features.description: Stores user-owned performance metadata without persisting question text, passages, answer choices, or official explanations.

novel_features.name: Weakness report
novel_features.description: Ranks question types and sections by accuracy from local SQLite.

novel_features.name: Review links
novel_features.description: Jumps back into LawHub for official content review instead of copying official LSAT content locally.

novel_features.name: Question notes
novel_features.description: Adds user-authored wrong-answer review notes to local question metadata.

novel_features.name: Agent-shaped output
novel_features.description: Compact JSON and field selection for low-token agent workflows.
